title: Inter Realms Community SMP Sets
description: This is the set of required mods for the Inter Realms Community SMP.
body:
This is the set of required mods for the Inter Realms Community SMP. 

This modpack comes in different editions to cater to your play style on the Inter Realms Community SMP

As of 1.21.4, we have condensed the pack down to one pack. Please see the latest download for a full listing of the mods.
